title: Code of Salt and Honey
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: When a renowned honey sommelier is found dead in her tasting room locked from the inside, a pastry chef turned amateur sleuth must decode a trail of cryptic recipes left in the victim's handwriting to find the killer before the only surviving jar of a legendary honey spoils as evidence.
long_description: When a renowned honey sommelier is found dead in her tasting room locked from the inside, a pastry chef turned amateur sleuth must decode a trail of cryptic recipes left in the victim's handwriting to find the killer before the only surviving jar of a legendary honey spoils as evidence.
